<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.44.8-Solothurn">
  <identifier>GEOSDE.comunas2008</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>ES</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>GEOSDE.comunas2008</title>
  <abstract>REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.

REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <links>
    <link url="Server=172.22.110.36; Service=5151; Database=sde; User=geosde; Version=SDE.DEFAULT" type="ArcSDE Connection" description="" name="SDE Feature Class" size="" format="" mimeType=""/>
  </links>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Acceso">REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.</constraints>
  <rights>REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["unknown",BASEGEOGCRS["unknown",DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984",ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],ID["EPSG",6326]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8901]]],CONVERSION["UTM zone 18S",METHOD["Transverse Mercator",ID["EPSG",9807]],PARAMETER["Latitude of natural origin",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8801]],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",-75,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["Scale factor at natural origin",0.9996,SCALEUNIT["unity",1],ID["EPSG",8805]],PARAMETER["False easting",500000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",10000000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]],ID["EPSG",16118]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["(E)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1,ID["EPSG",9001]]],AXIS["(N)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1,ID["EPSG",9001]]]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=utm +zone=18 +south +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>3168</srsid>
      <srid>32718</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:32718</authid>
      <description>WGS 84 / UTM zone 18S</description>
      <projectionacronym>utm</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7030</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial dimensions="2" maxx="704690.56019999994896352" minx="-8496.1213000000007014" maxz="0" miny="3794823.35760000022128224" maxy="8065196.81630000006407499" minz="0" crs="EPSG:4326"/>
  </extent>
</qgis>
